name: BRIDGFORD FOODS CORP
summary: Bridgford Foods Corporation, a California corporation organized in 1952, manufactures, markets, and distributes frozen and snack food products throughout the United States. Operating in two segments, the company produces biscuits, bread dough, roll dough items, dry sausage, salami, and beef jerky. It serves approximately 19,000 retail locations via direct-store-delivery and food service distributors, with snack foods representing 75% and frozen foods 25% of fiscal 2025 consolidated sales.

products.name: Frozen Biscuits and Bread Dough
products.description: Frozen biscuit and bread dough items sold to food service and retail customers.

products.name: Roll Dough Items
products.description: Frozen roll dough products distributed through wholesalers and distributors.

products.name: Dry Sausage and Salami
products.description: Processed dry sausage and salami products sold across retail and food service channels.

products.name: Beef Jerky
products.description: Snack food beef jerky distributed through direct-store-delivery and warehouse distribution.

products.name: Private Label Snack Foods
products.description: Private label non-branded snack food products with increased demand due to consumer cost-consciousness.
